info.title: LA Muni RAG v1 API Contract
info.description: Contract for implemented tenant-scoped catalog, Search, dedicated EvidenceBundle, ClaimPack, EvidenceGapRequest, procedure-query, ingestion-job monitoring, workflow lifecycle, and ProcedureCase providers. Registration and retrieval labels cannot establish corpus completeness, legal validity, applicability, human approval, production infrastructure, merge, or deployment.

post.description: Accepts a tenant-scoped Content Agency ClaimPackRequest. LA Muni RAG returns claims, citations, paraphrase limits, disclaimer, validity bound, and source links only; it does not generate copy, assets, channel plans, publication tasks, or campaign strategy.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Stable key for safely replaying the same tenant-scoped request.

parameters.name: X-Request-Id
parameters.description: UUID that must equal request_id in the body.

200.description: Contract-valid ClaimPack with at least one citable supported or comparative claim.

post.summary: Register an unresolved documentary evidence need
post.description: Accepts a tenant-scoped EvidenceGapRequest from OS Electoral and returns an immutable open research-intake acknowledgement. Echoed requester fields are explicitly requester_supplied_unverified. Acceptance does not declare any source official, current, applicable, acquired, ingested, or resolved.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Stable key for safely replaying the same tenant-scoped request.

parameters.name: X-Request-Id
parameters.description: UUID that must equal request_id in the body.

post.description: Accepts a tenant-scoped ProcedureQueryRequest. LA Muni RAG returns evidence or procedural artifacts only; it does not return campaign strategy or generate content.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Stable key for safely replaying the same tenant-scoped request.

parameters.name: X-Request-Id
parameters.description: UUID that must equal request_id in the body.

200.description: Contract-valid EvidenceBundle, draft ProcedureWorkflow, or conservative ProcedureAssessment response.

post.summary: Enqueue an already accepted document version for ingestion
post.description: Requires an existing tenant-owned document version whose persisted content digest matches the request. This operation does not upload bytes or assert scanner/storage acceptance.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Stable key for safely replaying the same principal-scoped ingestion request.

parameters.name: X-Request-Id
parameters.description: UUID that must equal request_id in the body.

200.description: Exact idempotent replay of an existing ingestion job.

202.description: A new job was queued or equivalent tenant work was deduplicated.

get.description: Returns safe state and bounded error classification without lease/fencing tokens, object coordinates, pipeline secrets or raw stacks.

parameters.name: X-Request-Id
parameters.description: Request correlation UUID; for POST it must equal request_id in the body.

parameters.name: tenant_id
parameters.description: Tenant UUID that must match the authenticated credential.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Bounded page size.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque keyset cursor returned by the previous page.

get.description: Returns status only for a job visible to the authenticated tenant. Missing and cross-tenant identifiers share the same non-leaking 404 response.

post.description: Creates a tenant-scoped workflow version. AI, human, and imported definitions all enter the lifecycle as draft; callers cannot create an approved version.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Stable key for safely replaying the same tenant-scoped request.

parameters.name: X-Request-Id
parameters.description: UUID that must equal request_id in the body.

201.description: A new draft workflow version was created and audited.

post.summary: Submit or review a workflow version
post.description: Authors may submit drafts for review. Distinct reviewers may record changes_requested or recommended_for_approval decisions. Action-specific RBAC is enforced server-side.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Stable key for safely replaying the same tenant-scoped request.

parameters.name: X-Request-Id
parameters.description: UUID that must equal request_id in the body.

200.description: The review transition was applied and the current workflow version is returned.

post.summary: Approve, supersede, or archive a workflow version
post.description: A distinct authorized approver may approve only after a recommended human review. Approved content is immutable; replacement requires a new version and explicit supersession.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Stable key for safely replaying the same tenant-scoped request.

parameters.name: X-Request-Id
parameters.description: UUID that must equal request_id in the body.

200.description: The approval, supersession, or archival transition was applied.

get.description: Returns a workflow version visible to the authenticated tenant. Missing and cross-tenant identifiers share the same non-leaking 404 semantics.

parameters.name: workflow_version_id
parameters.description: Tenant-scoped workflow version UUID.

parameters.name: X-Request-Id
parameters.description: UUID that must equal request_id in the body.

200.description: Tenant-scoped workflow version and current lifecycle evidence.

post.summary: Create a procedure case from an approved workflow
post.description: Creates a tenant-scoped operational case bound immutably to an approved workflow version. It does not declare legal compliance or institutional closure.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Stable key for safely replaying the same tenant-scoped request.

parameters.name: X-Request-Id
parameters.description: UUID that must equal request_id in the body.

201.description: A tenant-scoped procedure case was created from an approved workflow version.

get.summary: Read a procedure case and evidence dossier
get.description: Returns the tenant-scoped operational state, document references, blockers, and append-only case history.

parameters.name: X-Request-Id
parameters.description: UUID that must equal request_id in the body.

200.description: The tenant-scoped procedure case and bounded evidence dossier.

patch.summary: Apply a role-aware procedure case mutation
patch.description: Applies one bounded mutation with an expected revision. Validation states are documentary review states, not legal conclusions.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Stable key for safely replaying the same tenant-scoped request.

parameters.name: X-Request-Id
parameters.description: UUID that must equal request_id in the body.

200.description: The procedure case mutation was applied with optimistic concurrency and audit evidence.

get.description: Returns only the authenticated tenant. Registration and validation states remain distinct.

parameters.name: X-Request-Id
parameters.description: Request correlation UUID; for POST it must equal request_id in the body.

parameters.name: tenant_id
parameters.description: Tenant UUID that must match the authenticated credential.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Bounded page size.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque keyset cursor returned by the previous page.

post.description: Creates unreviewed discovery metadata. The caller cannot declare official authority, validity, acquisition, ingestion or retrieval completion.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Stable principal-scoped replay key.

parameters.name: X-Request-Id
parameters.description: Request correlation UUID; for POST it must equal request_id in the body.

201.description: The resource was registered without promoting authority or processing state.

get.summary: List governed documents and latest declared version
get.description: Returns accepted object/scan identity only when the existing artifact subsystem accepted the exact version. Private coordinates and scanner internals are omitted.

parameters.name: X-Request-Id
parameters.description: Request correlation UUID; for POST it must equal request_id in the body.

parameters.name: tenant_id
parameters.description: Tenant UUID that must match the authenticated credential.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Bounded page size.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque keyset cursor returned by the previous page.

post.summary: Register a document and declared version
post.description: Requires an existing tenant source and SHA-256. Registration alone is not acquisition, scan acceptance, ingestion, retrieval validation or legal validity.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Stable principal-scoped replay key.

parameters.name: X-Request-Id
parameters.description: Request correlation UUID; for POST it must equal request_id in the body.

201.description: The resource was registered without promoting authority or processing state.

get.description: Returns catalog identity and latest/approved version numbers without workflow definitions or review/approval notes.

parameters.name: X-Request-Id
parameters.description: Request correlation UUID; for POST it must equal request_id in the body.

parameters.name: tenant_id
parameters.description: Tenant UUID that must match the authenticated credential.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Bounded page size.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque keyset cursor returned by the previous page.

post.description: Executes an explicit keyword, phrase, semantic, or hybrid retrieval mode over eligible public evidence. Semantic and hybrid requests fail closed when the configured capability is unavailable.

parameters.name: X-Request-Id
parameters.description: Request correlation UUID that must equal request_id in the body.

200.description: Bounded tenant-scoped search results with explicit authority, temporal, evidence, and score semantics.

post.description: Creates the canonical EvidenceBundle from eligible tenant evidence. Only supported documentary excerpts become ordinary claims; comparative and validation-required material is never promoted.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Stable principal-scoped key for exact replay of the same request.

parameters.name: X-Request-Id
parameters.description: Request correlation UUID that must equal request_id in the body.

200.description: Contract-valid EvidenceBundle with exact replay semantics and explicit gaps or contradictions.

post.summary: Query reviewed public municipal evidence without a browser service credential
post.description: Binds tenant and jurisdiction server-side, permits keyword or phrase retrieval only, and returns bounded public citations or an explicit no-evidence state. The route requires an exact reviewed Origin and never accepts Authorization, tenant, credential, semantic, or hybrid input.

parameters.name: Origin
parameters.description: Exact reviewed browser origin.

parameters.name: X-Request-Id
parameters.description: Optional correlation UUID. The server generates one when omitted.

200.description: Deterministic public evidence response or explicit no-evidence state.

429.description: Global or per-client rate limit exceeded.

503.description: Public gateway is disabled or unavailable.

bearerAuth.description: Tenant-scoped service, integration, or operator credential. Authorization remains operation-specific.

RetryAfter.description: Seconds before a retry is allowed.

BadRequest.description: The request failed schema or semantic validation.

Unauthorized.description: Bearer authentication is missing or invalid.

Forbidden.description: The credential cannot access the requested tenant or resource.

NotFound.description: The tenant-scoped resource was not found; no cross-tenant existence information is returned.

Conflict.description: The idempotency key or referenced version conflicts with existing state.

RateLimited.description: The tenant or credential rate limit was exceeded.

InternalError.description: An internal error occurred without exposing sensitive details.

Unavailable.description: The requested contract capability or a required dependency is unavailable.
